programs.title: The Duplicate
programs.desc: When Jessica asks her twin sister Alessandra for help with a blackmailer she gets more than she bargained for.

programs.title: Revenge Of Robert
programs.desc: Infamous killer doll Robert does battle with Hitler's henchmen aboard a train in Nazi Germany.

programs.title: Curse Of The Nun
programs.desc: A damaged young woman is looking forward to moving to a beautiful new home, but the spirit of a deranged nun wants her to stay right where she is

programs.title: Always And Forever
programs.desc: After a tragedy reunites Nicole with her childhood friends, they each find themselves in danger, targets of a deranged stalker. Nicole knows this can't be a coincidence. The secrets of their past are coming back to haunt them.
